## Verification

List the commands you ran, and any you could not run.

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] Relevant package tests (`cd packages/<pkg> && bun test`)
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot or short recording

## Checklist

- [ ] Title uses `type(scope): summary` (types: feat/fix/docs/chore/refactor/test)
- [ ] No new defaults for upstream OpenCode state (`.opencode/`, `opencode.json`, `OPENCODE_*`)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal data committed
